highlights.title: Former Tesla board member says SpaceX needs to achieve 2 of its 3 moonshots to keep its valuation
highlights.description: SpaceX has achieved its goal of becoming the largest IPO on record.

highlights.title: OpenAI says it's engaging 'constructively' with state AGs about concerns
highlights.description: The Wall Street Journal reported that a coalition of state attorneys general have opened an investigation into OpenAI.

highlights.title: OpenAI Probed by Coalition of State Attorneys General
highlights.description: OpenAI is under investigation by a coalition of state attorneys general who requested information from the artificial intelligence company on a wide range of topics.

highlights.title: Anthropic's pre-IPO shares fall as US government shuts down its most powerful AI model
highlights.description: A jailbreak report prompted Washington to pull Fable 5 and Mythos 5 from all users. Anthropic complied but pushed back hard, saying the finding sets a standard that would halt the entire AI industry.

highlights.title: Anthropic Says It’s Taking Claude Fable 5 Offline to Comply With US Government Order
highlights.description: “The government believes it has become aware of a method of bypassing, or ‘jailbreaking’ Fable 5,” the company said in a blog post.

highlights.title: Anthropic pulls Claude Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5 following US government directive
highlights.description: Anthropic confirmed tonight that it has disabled access to Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 to all customers, following an export control directive from the US government. Here are the details.

highlights.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
highlights.description: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

highlights.title: Anthropic shuts down Fable, Mythos models following Trump admin directive
highlights.description: Commerce dept. worries that a Fable 5 "jailbreak" could be a national security threat.

highlights.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
highlights.description: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.

highlights.title: SpaceX IPO scramble reveals difference between tokenizing a stock and getting one
highlights.description: Crypto platforms promised early access to the blockbuster SpaceX IPO through tokenized shares. The problem wasn't technology, but getting the actual stock.

ai.title: OpenAI is facing investigation from a group of state attorneys general
ai.description: A coalition of state attorneys general is asking OpenAI for documents about its activities.

ai.title: Anthropic blocks all customers' access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
ai.description: Anthropic has suspended all access to its new AI models Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with a government order citing national security concerns.

ai.title: A German Court Has Ruled That Google Is Liable for False Statements Generated by AI Overviews
ai.description: The ruling holds that a company that designs, trains, operates, and manages an AI system must assume legal liability for any damages caused by the responses it generates.

ai.title: Bitcoin steadies above $63,000 as its worst week in months got a late macro rescue
ai.description: A tiny Strategy sale raised a bigger question about Saylor’s never-sell stance, while easing Iran fears and a strong SpaceX debut helped risk assets recover.

crypto.title: Top cryptographers can't agree on Bitcoin's biggest quantum question
crypto.description: A Coinbase-convened panel says Bitcoin should start preparing for quantum attacks now, but declines to take a position on whether millions of vulnerable coins, including many linked to Satoshi Nakamoto, should eventually be frozen.
